name: Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in as little boiling water as possible until tender.
2. While still hot, peel the potatoes and place them in a large mixing bowl.
3. Mash the potatoes well.
4. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed and gradually add butter, milk, orange zest, sherry, and brown sugar.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff and gently fold into the potato mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle the top with chopped pecans that have been mixed with melted butter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for approximately 30 minutes.
